issues.detail: No PreToolUse Write content secret scan — secrets sit unguarded on disk until git commit time
No exclusion for node_modules/, vendor/, dist/ — subprocess spawned per Edit even for generated files
Uses git add -A — stages all working tree changes, not just edited file. Unrelated dirty files enter checkpoint commits.
No exclusion for node_modules/ or vendor/. Could warn on legitimate vendor .md files.
No timeout in hooks.json. tsc --noEmit can stall session 5-30s on every .ts/.tsx Edit. Suggest: add timeout:30, async:true.
No timeout in hooks.json. cargo check can stall 30-60s on every .rs Edit with cold cache. Suggest: add timeout:60, async:true.
Uses execFileSync (synchronous) internally despite async:true declaration. Formatter latency (200ms-2s) blocks Node event loop.
Both start a Node process per Edit in all projects, even non-TS/non-Rust ones. Pure startup overhead. Suggest: merge dispatch into format-dispatch.js.
git commit --no-verify silently bypasses project lint-staged/husky hooks on every checkpoint. Suggest: add checkpoint_bypass_hooks config flag.
logSessionCost uses summary.toolsUsed.length (max 20 unique tool names) not actual tool call count. Cost estimate systematically low.
Fire on every Edit in non-TS/non-Rust projects, immediately exit after extension check. Unnecessary process spawn per Edit.
No PreToolUse Write hook scanning tool_input.content via scanForSecrets(). Secrets written by Write tool bypass guard until git commit time.
async:true race between auto-checkpoint.js and post-edit-format-dispatch.js on same PostToolUse Edit|Write event. Checkpoint may capture pre- or post-formatted code non-deterministically.
console.log warnings emitted twice: inline in post-edit-format-dispatch and again at Stop by check-console-log.js.

high_issues.detail: No timeout in hooks.json — tsc --noEmit can stall session 5-30s per .ts/.tsx Edit
high_issues.fix: Add timeout:30 and async:true to hooks.json entry

high_issues.detail: No timeout in hooks.json — cargo check can stall 30-60s per .rs Edit
high_issues.fix: Add timeout:60 and async:true to hooks.json entry

medium_issues.detail: git add -A stages unrelated dirty files

medium_issues.fix: Add PreToolUse Write hook using scanForSecrets() on tool_input.content

medium_issues.detail: async race: auto-checkpoint vs format-dispatch on same event
medium_issues.fix: Remove async:true from auto-checkpoint.js to enforce ordering
